message:
🐛 Fix LLM auth: use GH_MODELS_PAT for GitHub Models API (#17)

The default GITHUB_TOKEN in Actions doesn't have access to the
GitHub Models API (401). Added GH_MODELS_PAT secret and pass it
as LLM_TOKEN to both the generator and mission-executor.

Falls back to GITHUB_TOKEN if GH_MODELS_PAT is not set.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
